step_rationale: β7 integrin on leukocytes; mucosal homing integrin; involved in leukocyte recruitment in ACS.
mechanism: ITGB7 integrin mediates adhesion of leukocytes to inflamed endothelium and vascular tissue in acute coronary syndrome.

references.title: Oligonucleotide microarray and QRT-PCR study of adhesion protein gene expression in acute coronary syndrome patients.
